I'll check enrich-evergreen-notes.py for reusable patterns. The script will parse each note's title and first bold paragraph to generate four genre-specific examples. I may run this as a direct file edit to leverage LLM generation.

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
notes = Path("content/english/notes")
required = ["**Sports:**", "**Non-technical work:**", "**Home with children:**", "**Real world:**"]
bad = []
for p in sorted(notes.glob("*.md")):
    t = p.read_text()
    if "## Examples" not in t:
        if "## Example" in t:
            bad.append((p.name, "still Example"))
        continue
    for r in required:
        if r not in t:
            bad.append((p.name, f"missing {r}"))
            break
print(f"issues: {len(bad)}")
for b in bad[:20]:
    print(b)
PY</summary>

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
notes = Path("content/english/notes")
required = ["**Sports:**", "**Non-technical work:**", "**Home with children:**", "**Real world:**"]
bad = []
for p in sorted(notes.glob("*.md")):
    t = p.read_text()
    if "## Examples" not in t:
        if "## Example" in t:
            bad.append((p.name, "still Example"))
        continue
    for r in required:
        if r not in t:
            bad.append((p.name, f"missing {r}"))
            break
print(f"issues: {len(bad)}")
for b in bad[:20]:
    print(b)
PY
```

_**Agent (default)**_

Done. Every atomic note now uses **`## Examples`** with four genre bullets instead of a single **`## Example`**.

### Format (all 172 notes)

```markdown
## Examples

- **Sports:** ...
- **Non-technical work:** ...
- **Home with children:** ...
- **Real world:** ...
```

Each bullet is one concrete scene that illustrates the note’s claim in that genre.

### Also updated

- **Meta docs:** `getting-started.md`, `note-relationships.md`, `atomic-notes.md` — rules now describe four genre examples
- **Hugo lint:** allowed section is `## Examples` (replacing `Example`); issue panel copy updated; cache bumped to `note-issues-v7`

### Sample

```37:42:content/english/notes/capture.md
## Examples

- **Sports:** A play tweak hits during cooldown and I scribble it on my wristband before the locker room noise eats it — one inbox, file it Sunday when the spark is safe.
- **Non-technical work:** A customer complaint gives me a fix idea mid-shift and I drop it in one inbox — no tagging yet, process it Friday when the spark is already saved.
- **Home with children:** On the jeepney my kid says something I want to remember and I scribble it on a receipt before the station noise eats it — one pocket notebook, no sorting yet.
- **Real world:** A commute thought lands and I voice-memo it before the jeepney drowns it out — one trusted pipe, weekly review empties it.
```

`npm run lint:notes` passes — no broken wikilinks from this change. Two pre-existing unlinked mentions remain (unrelated to this edit).
